name: Accent Jewelers & Loans
description_short: Memphis-based jewelry buyer and collateral lender offering same-day cash for gold, silver, diamonds, and fine jewelry with no credit check required.
description_long:
Accent Jewelers has operated as a Memphis jewelry store and buyer since 1989, establishing itself as a primary business focused on purchasing valuables rather than treating it as a secondary service. The company emphasizes expertise in jewelry evaluation and fair payouts for customers looking to sell or pledge their items.

Accent Jewelers offers a range of services centered on jewelry and valuables. Core services include collateral-based loans on fine jewelry, gold, silver, luxury watches, and diamonds with no credit check; buying gold, silver, coins, diamonds, and other valuables with same-day payment options; professional jewelry appraisals with written reports for insurance or estate planning; professional repairs and restoration for fine jewelry, engagement rings, and watches; and layaway programs allowing purchases to be paid over up to 10 months with a 10% fee. The company also sells jewelry inventory through its retail storefront.

Accent differentiates itself through its no-appointment-needed model, no-obligation offers, willingness to evaluate items in any condition (dirty, broken, or unpolished), and the option to receive double in-store credit instead of cash payment. The company operates with transparent pricing and positions itself as paying more than competitors, backed by 35+ years of operational history. All item evaluations are free regardless of whether a purchase occurs.

As a pawn shop and collateral lender, Accent Jewelers serves customers needing immediate liquidity against jewelry assets and those looking to sell valuables. The primary caveat is that loans are collateral-based with jewelry held as security, and while no credit check is required, loan terms, interest rates, and redemption periods are not disclosed on the website. Customers should verify all terms before agreeing to a loan.
pros: No credit check required for collateral loans on jewelry, watches, and precious metals
Same-day payment available for both loan disbursement and item purchases
No appointment necessary—walk-in evaluations accepted anytime
Free evaluations for items in any condition with no obligation to sell
35+ years of operational history and established reputation in Memphis market
Option to receive double in-store credit instead of cash payment
Certified professional appraisals with written reports and digital copies for insurance/estate planning
cons: Website does not disclose loan terms, interest rates, APR, redemption periods, or repayment schedules
Limited geographic service area—operates only in Memphis, TN with no indication of other locations
Layaway program charges a 10% fee and requires up to 10 months to complete payment, which increases total cost
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who own jewelry, watches, or precious metals and want to avoid credit checks
Memphis residents looking to sell gold, silver, diamonds, or valuables without appointment hassle
Customers seeking professional jewelry appraisals for insurance, estate planning, or resale purposes
diagnosis: Accent Jewelers is best for Memphis-area residents or visitors with jewelry, watches, or precious metals who need quick cash without credit approval or prefer to sell valuables without appointment. The primary caveat is that loan terms, interest rates, and repayment conditions are not publicly disclosed on the website, so consumers should contact the store directly to understand the full cost and terms before pledging collateral.
services: Collateral loans on fine jewelry, gold, silver, luxury watches, and diamonds with no credit check
Gold buying with same-day payment or double in-store credit option
Silver buying with same-day payment or double in-store credit option
Professional written jewelry appraisals with digital copies
Layaway program with 10% fee for up to 10 months
Retail jewelry sales from in-store inventory
